tool_input.content:
{
  "stage": "domain_expert",
  "status": "complete",
  "jira_issue": "RAG-001",
  "branch": "RAG-001_foundation-spike",
  "revision": 3,
  "revision_note": "Validates TPM spec v3 incorporating design rethink. Cynefin moved from Complicated to Clear with pockets. Critical spike gate on Ollama 2048-token context cap.",
  "output_files": ["domain_analysis.md"],
  "cynefin_classification": "clear_with_complicated_pockets",
  "cynefin_rationale": "Core problem (parse, embed, index, search, return) is well-understood. Complicated pockets: Ollama context window behavior, hybrid search quality tuning, bleve FAISS 768-dim integration. Spike resolves all pockets.",
  "cynefin_trajectory": "Post-spike: fully Clear. All remaining work is straightforward engineering.",
  "assumption_validation": [
    {
      "id": "AV-1",
      "claim": "nomic-embed-text-v1.5 via Ollama provides 8192-token embedding window",
      "status": "NEEDS_SPIKE_CRITICAL",
      "detail": "Multiple user reports that Ollama caps context at 2048 tokens regardless of model capability. v1.5 tag sets num_ctx=8192 but enforcement is inconsistent. 5-minute spike test: embed >2048-token text, compare with truncated version.",
      "impact_if_invalid": "Design rationale partially collapses. Most sections still fit at 2048 tokens, but safety margin disappears and maxChunkSize of 16K chars would be truncated. Fallback: ONNX Runtime backend loads model directly with full 8192 context.",
      "severity": "critical"
    },
    {
      "id": "AV-2",
      "claim": "Ollama supports task prefixes for nomic-embed-text asymmetric search",
      "status": "VALIDATED",
      "detail": "Ollama passes raw text to model. Prefix is included in input string. Model trained with prefixes. Backend implementation prepends prefix transparently.",
      "severity": "none"
    },
    {
      "id": "AV-3",
      "claim": "Bleve FAISS backend handles 768-dim vectors",
      "status": "VALIDATED",
      "detail": "Bleve v2.4.0+ supports 1-2048 dimensions (4096 in v2.4.1+). 768 is well within range. Cosine similarity supported. Spike needed only for integration testing of specific Go API calls.",
      "severity": "low"
    },
    {
      "id": "AV-4",
      "claim": "Search latency < 100ms p95 including Ollama embedding",
      "status": "PLAUSIBLE_NEEDS_SPIKE",
      "detail": "Ollama embedding: 15-50ms. HTTP overhead: 1-5ms. Bleve search at 500 chunks: <20ms. Total estimate: 36-75ms. Within budget but tight. Cold model load on first call: 500ms+. Model warm-up at startup recommended.",
      "severity": "medium"
    },
    {
      "id": "AV-5",
      "claim": "Hash-based incremental indexing is correct at document level",
      "status": "VALIDATED_WITH_GAPS",
      "detail": "Core approach is sound. Gap: deleted files not handled in FR-005 (chunks persist after source file deletion). Gap: write serialization scope not explicitly defined for directory-level operations.",
      "severity": "medium"
    },
    {
      "id": "AV-6",
      "claim": "YAML front matter parsing via gopkg.in/yaml.v3 is robust",
      "status": "VALIDATED",
      "detail": "Standard approach, well-understood. Edge cases (missing delimiters, no front matter, unsupported types) are gracefully handled by the library. Spec correctly avoids schema validation rabbit hole.",
      "severity": "none"
    }
  ],
  "consumer_analysis": {
    "tool_purpose_coverage": {
      "search": ["P1", "P3"],
      "read": ["P1", "P3"],
      "index": ["P2", "P3"],
      "status": ["P2"]
    },
    "gaps": [
      {
        "id": "GAP-1",
        "description": "No document listing / discovery capability",
        "severity": "low",
        "recommendation": "Extend status tool with optional verbose mode in future iteration"
      },
      {
        "id": "GAP-2",
        "description": "No deletion / un-index capability for individual documents",
        "severity": "medium",
        "recommendation": "For MVP, force rebuild serves as cleanup. Ensure directory indexing handles deleted files."
      },
      {
        "id": "GAP-3",
        "description": "No project parameter in tool schemas (PRD had multi-project IndexRegistry)",
        "severity": "low",
        "recommendation": "Acceptable for MVP. Scope field could be extended to 'project:name' if needed later."
      }
    ],
    "redundancies": [],
    "workflow_validated": true,
    "workflow_description": "search (discover) -> read (retrieve) -> agent reasons with targeted context. Two-phase pattern delivers 12x token reduction vs full document dump."
  },
  "risk_assessment": [
    {
      "id": "RISK-1",
      "title": "Ollama 2048-token context cap",
      "severity": "critical",
      "probability": "medium",
      "impact": "high",
      "mitigation": "Spike validation (5-min test). Fallback: ONNX Runtime backend, newer Ollama version, or reduced maxChunkSize.",
      "residual_risk": "Embedder interface contains blast radius regardless of outcome."
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-2",
      "title": "Ollama as runtime dependency",
      "severity": "high",
      "probability": "high",
      "impact": "medium",
      "mitigation": "Fail-fast at startup (FR-002). Mock Embedder for tests. Docker sidecar pattern. Future: ONNX backend eliminates dependency.",
      "residual_risk": "Four-step first-time setup friction. Documentation must be excellent."
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-3",
      "title": "Search quality below P3 threshold",
      "severity": "high",
      "probability": "medium",
      "impact": "high",
      "mitigation": "30-query golden set (NFR-022). Configurable BM25/KNN weights. Task prefixes. Section-level chunking baseline.",
      "residual_risk": "Golden set quality determines evaluation quality. Building a representative golden set is itself an expert task."
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-4",
      "title": "Knowledge freshness (stale index)",
      "severity": "medium",
      "probability": "high",
      "impact": "medium",
      "mitigation": "Hash-based incrementalism. Startup hash-check for global sources. force=true for full rebuild.",
      "residual_risk": "No automatic re-indexing. Curator must remember to call index after changes."
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-5",
      "title": "Deleted file chunks persist in index",
      "severity": "medium",
      "probability": "medium",
      "impact": "medium",
      "mitigation": "Add deleted file handling to FR-005 directory indexing. Compare indexed document paths with filesystem.",
      "residual_risk": "None if implemented. Without it, index accumulates stale entries over time."
    },
    {
      "id": "RISK-6",
      "title": "Cross-platform embedding consistency",
      "severity": "low",
      "probability": "low",
      "impact": "low",
      "mitigation": "Use rank-aware metrics (NDCG) that tolerate minor reordering. Accept minor floating-point differences.",
      "residual_risk": "Golden set results may vary by 1-2 positions between Mac and Linux. Not meaningful in practice."
    }
  ],
  "discovery_model": {
    "entities": [
      {
        "name": "Document",
        "fields": ["path", "slug", "contentHash", "scope", "kind", "tags", "frontMatter", "title"],
        "notes": "Source markdown file. Path is unique identifier for indexing."
      },
      {
        "name": "Chunk",
        "fields": ["qualifiedId", "sectionId", "documentSlug", "title", "content", "vector", "scope", "kind", "tags", "position"],
        "notes": "Section-level unit. One per ## heading. Inherits scope/kind/tags from parent Document."
      },
      {
        "name": "SearchResult",
        "fields": ["chunk", "score", "snippet"],
        "notes": "Ranked result from hybrid search. Snippet is first 500 chars."
      },
      {
        "name": "IndexState",
        "fields": ["documentCount", "chunkCount", "globalChunkCount", "projectChunkCount", "documentHashes", "lastIndexTime"],
        "notes": "Aggregate state of the index. Returned by status tool."
      }
    ],
    "commands": [
      {
        "name": "IndexFile",
        "parameters": ["path", "scope", "kind", "force"],
        "preconditions": ["path exists", "passes security filter"],
        "effects": ["document parsed", "chunks created/updated", "hash recorded"],
        "idempotent": true
      },
      {
        "name": "IndexDirectory",
        "parameters": ["path", "scope", "kind", "force"],
        "preconditions": ["path exists", "is directory"],
        "effects": ["each file processed", "deleted files detected and chunks removed"],
        "idempotent": true
      },
      {
        "name": "Search",
        "parameters": ["query", "scope", "kind", "tags", "limit"],
        "preconditions": ["none (returns empty with hint if index empty)"],
        "effects": ["none (read-only)"],
        "performance": "< 100ms p95"
      },
      {
        "name": "Read",
        "parameters": ["id", "context"],
        "preconditions": ["id resolves to chunk or document"],
        "effects": ["none (read-only)"],
        "performance": "< 50ms p95"
      },
      {
        "name": "Status",
        "parameters": [],
        "preconditions": ["none"],
        "effects": ["none (read-only)"],
        "performance": "< 10ms p95"
      }
    ],
    "constraints": [
      {"id": "C1", "description": "Only .md and .txt files indexable", "enforcement": "security.go"},
      {"id": "C2", "description": "Files under maxFileSizeBytes (1MB default)", "enforcement": "security.go"},
      {"id": "C3", "description": "Blocklisted filenames rejected", "enforcement": "security.go"},
      {"id": "C4", "description": "Blocklisted directories skipped", "enforcement": "security.go"},
      {"id": "C5", "description": "Hash must differ for re-indexing (unless force)", "enforcement": "indexer.go"},
      {"id": "C6", "description": "Section IDs unique within document, qualified across documents", "enforcement": "sectionid.go + indexer.go"},
      {"id": "C7", "description": "Embedder reachable at startup (fail-fast)", "enforcement": "main.go"},
      {"id": "C8", "description": "Writes serialized, reads concurrent", "enforcement": "indexer.go"},
      {"id": "C9", "description": "Atomic swap preserves existing index on failure", "enforcement": "indexer.go"},
      {"id": "C10", "description": "Search results capped at limit (default 5, max 20)", "enforcement": "search.go"}
    ]
  },
  "spec_amendments": [
    {
      "id": "AMEND-1",
      "priority": "must-have",
      "target": "spike tasks",
      "description": "Add Ollama 2048-token context cap validation as first spike task. 5-minute test that decides primary backend recommendation."
    },
    {
      "id": "AMEND-2",
      "priority": "should-have",
      "target": "FR-005",
      "description": "Add deleted file handling for directory indexing. When files present in index but absent from filesystem, remove their chunks."
    },
    {
      "id": "AMEND-3",
      "priority": "should-have",
      "target": "FR-010",
      "description": "Add embedder warm-up at startup. First Ollama call after model load takes 500ms+. Warm with dummy embedding before reporting ready."
    },
    {
      "id": "AMEND-4",
      "priority": "nice-to-have",
      "target": "FR-009 (status)",
      "description": "Consider optional verbose mode returning document-level details (slug, path, scope, kind, chunkCount, lastIndexed)."
    },
    {
      "id": "AMEND-5",
      "priority": "nice-to-have",
      "target": "documentation",
      "description": "Document four-step setup process and provide Makefile target for prerequisite validation."
    }
  ],
  "overall_verdict": "READY_WITH_SPIKE_GATE",
  "verdict_detail": "Spec v3 is a substantial improvement. Design is clean, focused, and purpose-aligned. One critical spike gate (Ollama 2048-token cap) must be resolved before committing to Ollama as primary backend. Embedder interface contains the risk regardless of outcome. Three non-blocking amendments recommended.",
  "completed_at": "<TIMESTAMP>"
}
